case_title: MOHAMED HUSSEIN VS. MACKENZIE GREEN BAIL BONDS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY HUSSEIN, MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT MACKENZIE GREEN BAIL BONDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN, MOHAMED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MACKENZIE GREEN BAIL BONDS THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO PROVE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
